title: summarize.thread output (v1.0.0)
description: Example output schema for a task kind. Plugs into Result.output when Task.kind == 'summarize.thread'. Notice: free text lives under a named field ('summary') alongside structured siblings ('key_points', 'participants'). Evidence anchoring is carried at the Result level, not here.

summary.description: Natural-language summary. Free text lives HERE, not as the Result itself.

key_points.description: Structured takeaways. Downstream agents read these without parsing prose.

message_count.description: Number of messages considered. Lets a consumer detect when 'since' trimmed more than expected.
